nasb.text: They will be turned back and be utterly put to shame, Who trust in idols, Who say to molten images, “You are our gods.”

esv.text: They are turned back and utterly put to shame, who trust in carved idols, who say to metal images, “You are our gods.”

cnv.text: 那些倚靠偶像， 對鑄像說： “你們是我們的神”的， 必被趕逐，全然蒙羞。

ccb.text: 但那些信靠雕刻的偶像、 供奉金属铸像的必遭唾弃， 羞愧难当。

csbs.text: 那些依靠雕刻的偶像， 对铸造的偶像说‘你们是我们的神’的， 都必向后退缩，大大蒙羞。
